name: forjador-de-skills
description: Meta-skill for forging well-made Claude Code skills

plugins.name: forjador-de-skills
plugins.description: How to forge a well-made Claude Code skill plugin — repo anatomy (core + optional components), the authoring pipeline, distribution via a GitHub marketplace, naming and privacy conventions, plus copyable templates. A thin layer over superpowers:writing-skills and skill-creator.
